title: Maine Board of Overseers of the Bar — Ethics Opinions
description: Issued by the Board's Professional Ethics Commission (which has no separate website of its own). Table listed oldest-first by opinion number, but items are re-sorted by parsed date regardless. Low update frequency (a handful/year).
